span.p:
1. PARSE INTENT
Classify query type
Extract entities
Set strategy

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
2. QUERY GRAPH
Find relationships
Get neighbors
Enrich context

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3. INJECT SCRATCHPAD
Add working memory
Session observations
Recent inferences

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. RETRIEVE
Query vector store
Apply filters
Boost graph hits

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5. COMPRESS
Extract key fields
Minimize tokens
Preserve context

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
6. REASON
Call Azure OpenAI
Generate insights
Synthesize response

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
7. RESPOND
Format output
Add metadata
Return result
